Interface DeviationRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Deviation, Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Deviation, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Deviation, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Deviation, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Deviation, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Deviation>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Deviation, Long>
@Repository public interface DeviationRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Deviation, Long>
Repository for Deviation entities.

Provides queries for retrieving deviation reports scoped to an organization, with support for pagination and date range filtering used in report generation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    existsByReportedBy(User user)
    Checks whether any deviation has been reported by the given user.

    Returns all deviations for a given organization.

    Returns a paginated list of deviations for a given organization.
    List<Deviation>
    findAllByOrganizationIdAndCreatedAtBetween(Long organizationId, LocalDateTime from, LocalDateTime to)
    Returns all deviations for a given organization created within a timestamp range.

  • Method Details

    • findAllByOrganizationId

      List<Deviation> findAllByOrganizationId(Long organizationId)
      Returns all deviations for a given organization.
      Parameters:
      organizationId - the ID of the organization
      Returns:
      a list of all deviations for the organization

    • findAllByOrganizationId

      org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Deviation> findAllByOrganizationId(Long organizationId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Returns a paginated list of deviations for a given organization.
      Parameters:
      organizationId - the ID of the organization
      pageable - pagination and sorting parameters
      Returns:
      a page of deviations for the organization

    • findAllByOrganizationIdAndCreatedAtBetween

      List<Deviation> findAllByOrganizationIdAndCreatedAtBetween(Long organizationId, LocalDateTime from, LocalDateTime to)
      Returns all deviations for a given organization created within a timestamp range. Used for report generation.
      Parameters:
      organizationId - the ID of the organization
      from - the start of the time range (inclusive)
      to - the end of the time range (inclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of deviations within the given period

    • existsByReportedBy

      boolean existsByReportedBy(User user)
      Checks whether any deviation has been reported by the given user. Used to enforce referential integrity before deleting a user.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to check
      Returns:
      true if the user has reported at least one deviation
